channel.title: Sisters of Summerville
channel.description: Daily AI comic strip featuring Honey Bear the Yorkie and Bootsie Belle the tuxedo cat getting into fresh trouble every day in Summerville, SC.

item.title: ✨🐾 Well Bless Your Heart 🐾✨
item.description: From the brisk, straightforward streets of Indiana to the slow-swaying porches of the Lowcountry, Honey Bear is discovering that Southern conversation is less about what you say and more about how you say it. Under the confident guidance of true Southern belle Bootsie Belle, our northern transplant takes her first brave steps into the delicate world of layered phrases, porch-side wisdom, and diplomacy served ice-cold with a slice of sweet tea charm. 🌸🍹 But when Honey Bear tries her new skills out in the wild, will her carefully practiced manners win hearts or simply leave the local wildlife utterly bewildered? Around here, kindness has a melody…and sometimes a warning hidden between the syllables. 😉🐿️
